comment: I love this app! There's barely any problems I have, all of which are very minor and can be solved with an easy fix. One being the 'just watched' feature, whenever I click the button it either loads for a minute. If that isn't what it does, it will take me down to the video and then take me back up. It gets quite annoying but it's easy to manage most the time. Other than that and other things I don't care much about, this app is great! Keep it up ^^
